payload.body:
Implemented Base UI React upgrade.

Completed:
- Updated `@base-ui/react` in `packages/ui/package.json` from `^1.5.0` to `^1.6.0`.
- Refreshed `pnpm-lock.yaml`; transitive `@base-ui/utils` moved from `0.2.9` to `0.3.1`.
- Committed and pushed branch `codex/UKN-70MK3-base-ui-1-6` at `e77068af6`.

Verification:
- `pnpm --filter @cycle/ui storybook:build` passed.
- `pnpm --filter @cycle/desktop build` passed after running `pnpm install` in the dedicated worktree to create workspace package links.
- `pnpm --filter @cycle/ui test` passed: 3 files, 19 tests.
- Repository-level smoke pass confirmed Base UI-backed button, input, checkbox, select, switch, avatar, separator, field/label, and dialog stories are included in the successful Storybook build.

Known limitation:
- Interactive in-app browser smoke testing could not be completed because the Browser plugin runtime failed before executing even a trivial command (`sandboxCwd must be an absolute file URI`). No code issue was observed from this failure.
